Data Structures: String, List, Set, Sorted Set, Hash, Stream, HyperLogLog, Bitmap, Geospatial
String Commands: GET, SET, MGET, MSET, INCR, INCRBY, DECR, APPEND, SETNX, SETEX

Hash Commands: HSET, HGET, HMGET, HGETALL, HDEL, HEXISTS, HKEYS, HVALS, HINCRBY
Key Commands: DEL, EXISTS, EXPIRE, TTL, PERSIST, RENAME, TYPE, SCAN
